Scenario.Name: llm_generated evidence is rejected
Scenario.Expected: Any source with source_origin=llm_generated must have source_authority=forbidden and must not be used as matching evidence.

Scenario.Name: user_decision cannot validate normative fields
Scenario.Expected: User decisions may validate project-only entities but cannot validate GESN code, norm unit, included works, excluded works, resource composition, coefficients, FSNB version, or technical part references.

Scenario.Name: rule with missing GESN evidence cannot be active
Scenario.Expected: Validation fails if a matching rule has status=active and missing GESN or other required evidence.

Scenario.Name: file in inbox is not trusted until accepted into raw with checksum
Scenario.Expected: Files in data/reference/inbox are not trusted evidence until accepted into raw with checksum_sha256 and manifest metadata.

Scenario.Name: importing identical records across releases does not create duplicate revisions
Scenario.Expected: Records with identical canonical payload hashes reuse previous revisions.

Scenario.Name: changing one reference record creates one new object revision and one change_set entry
Scenario.Expected: A changed canonical payload creates exactly one new revision and one change_set entry for that logical object.

Scenario.Name: deleted reference record creates delete operation
Scenario.Expected: A record absent from the next release creates a delete operation and deleted change type.

Scenario.Name: matching rule depending on changed normative object is marked requires_norm_review
Scenario.Expected: When a depended normative reference object changes, the matching rule is marked requires_norm_review before reactivation.
